article_meta.title: The Corner NR PLUS Trade Breaking News: Americans Pay the Tariffs Their Government Imposes on Them By John R

reasoning: The model flagged genuine author-prose bias and avoided quoted/attributed material, but missed several clear instances and misapplied one bias type label.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged passages were in the author’s own prose; none were quotes or clearly attributed to sources.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged item is a defensible instance of author-level bias; none are neutral or sourced language.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable author-level bias such as loaded 'raked in,' 'has completely ignored this data, of course,' and subjective 'groundbreaking conclusion'/'Turns out Adam Smith got it right.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Correct for 'is a farce' (Opinion as Fact) and for subjective qualifiers; but 'Mudslinging/Ad Hominem' is a mislabel—sarcasm about Greenland is better categorized as Sensationalism/Emotionalism or Spin/Word Choice, not ad hominem.
